report.summary: Drafted 5 tweets (#515-519) and Newsletter v56 covering Drift Protocol $270M exploit, CLARITY Act four-way Senate deadlock, Solana 10.1B Q1 transactions, F&G recovery 8→12, and weekend market snapshot. Created 3 social card SVGs. Analytics: 685+ published pages, F&G at 12 (improving), BTC $66,855, ETH $2,058, stablecoins $316B ATH, SOL -13% weekly from Drift fallout.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #515: Drift Protocol $270M Exploit — social engineering + durable nonces, new attack vector on Solana DeFi (3-tweet thread, Sat Jul 26)
Tweet #516: CLARITY Act Four-Way Deadlock — House passed 294-134, Senate stalled on stablecoin yield, SEC roundtable Apr 16 (3-tweet thread, Mon Jul 28)
Tweet #517: Solana 10.1B Q1 Transactions — first blockchain to hit 10B in a single quarter, 2.4M active users (single tweet, Wed Jul 30)
Tweet #518: F&G Recovery Signal 8→12 — first upward tick in weeks, historical sub-10 outcomes, $316B stablecoin dry powder (single tweet, Thu Jul 31)
Tweet #519: Weekend Signal — Aug 1 market snapshot with BTC, ETH, F&G, Drift fallout, CLARITY timeline (single tweet, Sat Aug 1)

Newsletter v56: 'Drift's $270M Exploit, CLARITY Deadlock & Solana's Record Quarter' — market pulse, 3 new/updated guides, PQ crypto + token unlocks worth reading, degen corner on operational security > code security (Thu Jul 31)
Discord/Telegram announcement: Weekly v56 update with 5 highlights — Drift exploit, CLARITY deadlock, Solana Q1 record, F&G recovery, quantum-resistant milestones (Mon Jul 28)

sections.title: Key Narratives This Cycle
items: DRIFT PROTOCOL EXPLOIT: $270M drained from Drift on Solana — not a smart contract bug but social engineering + pre-signed durable nonce transactions. Attacker compromised admin keys, pre-signed withdrawals weeks in advance, executed all at once. SOL down 13% weekly. Biggest Solana DeFi hack ever. Security narrative shifting from code audits to operational security.

CLARITY ACT DEADLOCK: Passed House 294-134, now stuck in four-way Senate impasse over stablecoin yield. Banks want yield banned, crypto wants it allowed, Tillis-Alsobrooks compromise offers activity-based incentives. Senate returns April 13, markup expected late April. SEC roundtable April 16. Prediction markets: 82% passes in 2026. Failure to clear committee by May = dead before midterms.

SOLANA 10.1B Q1 TRANSACTIONS: First blockchain to cross 10B transactions in a single quarter. 2.4M active users. Record DeFi volume on Jupiter, Raydium, Orca. BitGo launched institutional lending on Solana. Usage growing despite price decline — classic divergence pattern.

FEAR & GREED RECOVERY: Index ticked from 8 to 12 — first upward move in weeks. Still Extreme Fear but improving. Historical sub-10 readings preceded +62% median 90-day BTC returns. $316B stablecoin ATH = unprecedented dry powder. Sentiment-liquidity divergence at all-time extremes.

REGULATORY MOMENTUM: SEC-CFTC issued comprehensive crypto token taxonomy. SEC roundtable April 16 on CLARITY Act. Australia Digital Assets Framework in effect. OCC custody rule live. Global regulatory clarity accelerating despite US Senate deadlock.
